creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
A quick test shows graphics/openimageio works with either version of 
hdf5 so I am ok with changing that dependency.

Looking at the info on freshports.org it appears that science/hdf5 only 
has 4 other ports still using it. It may be worth seeing if these last 
four can use the newer version as well leaving the older hdf5 able to be 
removed.
